ogTitle: Moerlong vs Monarto South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moerlong and Monarto South.
heading: Moerlong vs Monarto South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moerlong, South Australia and Monarto South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moerlong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Monarto South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moerlong or Monarto South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moerlong has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Monarto South scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moerlong scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Monarto South scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moerlong or Monarto South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moerlong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
